protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: Cells were lysed with Tx buffer (1% Triton X-100...) or with Tx buffer + freeze-thaw + n-octyl buffer; incubated for 1 h at 4 °C; collected as a pellet after centrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: cells were lysed with Triton X-100 (Tx) buffer; Tx buffer + freezing (TxF); Tx buffer + freezing + n-octyl-β-D-glucopyranoside buffer (TxnO)
